allow: PowerShell($conns = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; $pids = $conns | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique; foreach \($p in $pids\) { $proc = Get-Process -Id $p -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; "$p $\($proc.ProcessName\)"; Stop-Process -Id $p -Force -Confirm:$false })
Bash(git commit -m 'Add shimmer loading system, product gallery carousel, and hydration fixes *)
